summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that ALV is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $116.51. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 38.9%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $131.43 and a significant trendline confluence around $123.04 (formed by 2 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
